name: Revani (Semolina - Almond Syrup Cake with Syrup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1-1/2 cups of the sugar with the cold water in a saucepan and cook until dissolved. Add the cinnamon stick, cloves, and orange peel, and simmer for 15 minutes. Remove the flavorings and let cool.
2. Using an electric mixer, beat the butter in a large bowl until fluffy.
3. Gradually add the remaining sugar to the butter mixture, beating on medium speed.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
5. Sift the flour, semolina, baking powder, and almonds together.
6. Very gradually add the dry ingredients to the batter, beating on medium speed.
7. Pour in the vanilla and brandy and give the batter a last whirl on high speed for a few seconds.
8. Pour the batter into a buttered 9 x 12 x 3-inch cake pan and bake on the center rack of a moderate oven (350°F) for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the cake springs back when touched with a finger.
9. Remove from the oven and set the pan on a cake rack. Score the cake into diamond shapes.
10. Spoon the cooled syrup over the entire cake and let cool.
11. Each piece may be attractively garnished with a candied or marachino cherry slice in the center and almond slivers angled on each side.
